Master the Code

Deep dive into React, Next.js, and AI development with our expert-led tutorials.

React

Mastering React Hooks

Deep dive into useState, useEffect, and custom hooks. Learn advanced patterns for state management and side effects in modern React applications with real-world examples.

Read Full Tutorial
Next.js

Next.js App Router Guide

Explore the new App Router in Next.js 14. Learn about server components, parallel routes, intercepting routes, and building full-stack applications with the latest features.

Read Full Tutorial
AI

AI Integration for Developers

Learn how to integrate OpenAI, LangChain, and other AI tools into your web applications. Build intelligent chatbots, content generators, and automated workflows.

Read Full Tutorial
CSS

Tailwind CSS Mastery

From basics to advanced utility classes. Master responsive design, dark mode, custom animations, and component styling with the world's most popular CSS framework.

Read Full Tutorial
Animation

Framer Motion Animations

Create stunning animations and micro-interactions. Learn about gestures, variants, AnimatePresence, and building fluid UI transitions that delight users.

Read Full Tutorial
Performance

Performance Optimization

Speed up your React apps with code splitting, lazy loading, memoization techniques. Learn Core Web Vitals, image optimization, and build lightning-fast experiences.

Read Full Tutorial
